history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward, with the cell directly in front at row 06 column D. That cell is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The cells to my right on my current row are open floor, while the left side is blocked by a wall column. Turning right is the safest move to align toward an open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right. The cell directly in front of me is at row 07 column E, and it is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning left would face the open cell above me at row 06 column D, while turning right would face outside the shown safe corridor. The best next step is to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
